tagline: We are in this business because we love animals!

hero.headline:
Five Acres of Love for Your
Best Friend
hero.subheadline: Your pet deserves more than a kennel. Country K9 Pet Resort & Spa offers spacious suites, outdoor play areas, and personalized care on five peaceful acres in Stephenson, Virginia. Go on your trip worry-free — we treat your pet like family.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Pet Needs<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From overnight boarding to professional grooming and training, we provide complete pet care so you never have to worry about finding multiple providers.

cards.title: Pet Boarding
cards.description: Spacious, climate-controlled suites with large outdoor play areas, individual playtime, agility courses, and premium Kuranda beds. Your pet's home away from home.

cards.title: Professional Grooming
cards.description: Full-service dog and cat grooming including baths, haircuts, nail trims, ear cleaning, and breed-specific styling. Your pet leaves looking and feeling amazing.

cards.title: Dog Training
cards.description: Group obedience classes, agility training, and personalized programs for dogs of all ages. Build confidence, manners, and a stronger bond with your best friend.

cards.title: Board & Train
cards.description: An immersive program where your dog stays with us and receives daily professional training. Perfect for separation anxiety, behavioral issues, and building obedience.

cards.title: Spa Services
cards.description: Pampering treatments including de-shedding, skin-soothing baths, and specialty grooming packages. Because your pet deserves to be spoiled.

cards.title: Cat & Small Animal Care
cards.description: Dedicated feline cattery and small animal accommodations with individualized attention. Every species gets the specialized care they need.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Worry-Free Pet Care

steps.title: Schedule a Meet & Greet
steps.description: Call us or visit our five-acre facility in Stephenson. We'll give you a tour, meet your pet, and discuss their needs, diet, and any special requirements.

steps.title: We Pamper Your Pet
steps.description: Whether it's boarding, grooming, or training, our experienced team provides personalized care with outdoor play, climate-controlled suites, and constant supervision.

steps.title: Pick Up a Happy Pet
steps.description: Your furry family member comes home happy, healthy, and well-cared-for. We'll share updates on their stay so you always know they were in loving hands.

about.label: Why Pet Parents Trust Us
about.headline: More Than a Kennel — We're Your Pet's Second Family
about.description: Founded by Melissa and Tom Stubblefield, Country K9 was born from 18+ years as pet boarding consumers who wanted something better. Melissa retired from a 25-year IT career to pursue her lifelong passion for animal care. Every dollar of profit goes back into improving our facility — because your pet deserves a resort, not just a room.

features.title: Five Peaceful Acres
features.description: Our country setting, away from busy roads, provides a calm, safe environment with grassy play areas, an agility course, and an indoor playroom.

features.title: Multi-Pet & Military Discounts
features.description: We offer discounts for families with multiple pets, plus special pricing for military and law enforcement — our way of giving back.

features.title: Continuous Facility Upgrades
features.description: We reinvest every dollar of profit into making our resort better. Premium Kuranda beds, climate control, and new play features added regularly.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprise Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service that fits your pet's needs. Multi-pet discounts and military pricing available — just ask.

guarantee.headline: Our "Happy Pet" Promise
guarantee.description: If your pet isn't treated with the love, respect, and attention they deserve, we'll make it right immediately. We started Country K9 because we believe every animal deserves the highest quality care — and we stand behind that belief with every stay, every groom, and every training session.

faqs.question: What should I bring for my pet's boarding stay?
faqs.answer: Bring their regular food (to avoid tummy upset), any medications, and a favorite toy or blanket for comfort. We provide premium Kuranda beds, fresh water, and lots of love. A meet-and-greet visit beforehand is always welcome.

faqs.question: Do you offer tours of the facility?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We encourage every pet parent to visit before booking. See our five acres, meet our team, and let your pet explore. Call (540) 667-PETS to schedule a tour — we love showing off our resort.

faqs.question: Can you accommodate pets with special needs or anxiety?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team has extensive experience with separation anxiety, medical needs, and special diets. We provide individualized care plans and keep you updated throughout your pet's stay so you always have peace of mind.

faqs.question: Do you offer discounts for multiple pets?
faqs.answer: We do! Multi-pet discounts are available for families boarding more than one pet. We also offer military and law enforcement discounts. Call us for current rates and packages.

faqs.question: What training programs do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer group obedience classes, agility training, and our popular Board & Train program where your dog stays with us for immersive daily training. Programs are tailored to all ages and skill levels, addressing everything from basic commands to behavioral concerns.

testimonials.name: Sarah J.
testimonials.text: Thank you so much for welcoming Moose and treating him so great while he was on his doggie vacation. He had a wonderful time and we could tell he was well cared for.

testimonials.name: Jill L.
testimonials.text: My dog did very well despite prior separation anxiety. The staff handled it wonderfully and kept me updated throughout. I felt so much relief knowing he was in good hands.

testimonials.name: Sue C.
testimonials.text: Country K9 is a great kennel and grooming salon. The staff are very friendly and truly love animals. My pets always come home happy and well-groomed. Wouldn't go anywhere else.

contact.headline:
Ready to Give Your Pet
the Vacation They Deserve?
contact.subtitle: Schedule a free tour or book your pet's stay today. Call us or fill out the form — we'll get back to you within 24 hours with availability and pricing.

footer.description: Family-owned pet resort on five acres in Stephenson, Virginia. Serving the Winchester area since 2014.
